title: Cannot reorder Subitems
excerpt: We have several projects with Subitems. Most of our subitems are organized by a process flow and therefore need to be organized in a certain order. Some of our boards I can select subitems and click to drag them to the c…

posts.author: Jackie.Lee (Jackie Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: We have several projects with Subitems. Most of our subitems are organized by a process flow and therefore need to be organized in a certain order. Some of our boards I can select subitems and click to drag them to the correct position, others I am suddenly unable to modify. I am the board owner so permissions should not be the issue. Any advisement as to what else could prevent this functionality in various projects?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Jackie! This is odd that you aren’t able to rearrange some subitems! It is likely worth having our support team take a look into this since it might be a bug! Please send us a message via our Help Center here or DM us on any of our social media platforms!
